summary:
This joint resolution disapproves, under the Congressional Review Act, an Environmental Protection Agency rule titled “Waste Emissions Charge for Petroleum and Natural Gas Systems: Procedures for Facilitating Compliance, Including Netting and Exemptions,” published in the Federal Register on November 18, 2024.

The resolution provides that the EPA rule has no force or effect. As a result, the rule is nullified and may not be implemented or enforced. The text does not amend any other statutory provisions or establish replacement procedures. It was approved on March 14, 2025.
